source.name: Harvard School of Engineering and Applied Sciences

articles.author: Mass General Brigham Communications
articles.title: Is your cholesterol too high based on latest guidelines? - Harvard Gazette
articles.description: Study flags the elevated LDL levels of 1 in 3 Americans without history of heart disease as a major miss for prevention.
articles.content: A new study by investigators from Mass General Brigham finds that nearly 1 in 3 U.S. adults without heart disease and almost 4 in 5 of those who have already had a heart attack, stroke or other cardi… [+4593 chars]
